other_findings.finding: Tc cells are enriched in the stroma and periphery of adult tissue sections.
Tc (CD8+ T cell) population is characterized by cytotoxic functions and IFN-gamma secretion.

evidence_quotes.quote: Cytotoxic T cells (Tc, also known as CD8+ T cells) were defined by high expression of CD8A and CD8B.
evidence_quotes.context: Cluster annotations and marker gene table

evidence_quotes.quote: Top differentially expressed genes for Tc cells include GZMA, GZMK, and PRF1.

evidence_quotes.quote: Tc cells are enriched in the stroma and periphery of adult tissue sections.
